response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches the reference JSON for 'BANG!!!' and 'Bad Apple!!'. 2. Discarded the 'Life is GAME' reference lyrics as that section is purely instrumental/dance in this video. 3. Confirmed text matches full audio duration with precision timestamps. 4. Visual text on screen confirmed song titles and artistic transitions.

subtitles.original: 倍返し食らえ
subtitles.english: Take it, double time!

subtitles.original: パンチライン聴かせてあげる ah
subtitles.english: Let me hear your punchline, ah

subtitles.original: やってから考えなよ
subtitles.english: Think after you do it

subtitles.original: 私がついてるから ah
subtitles.english: Because I'm here with you, ah

subtitles.original: Everybody say I want to be free
subtitles.english: Everybody say I want to be free

subtitles.original: 狂うこのビート 空 十戒
subtitles.english: This beat goes crazy, Sky Ten Commandments

subtitles.original: 全部 黙らす show
subtitles.english: Silence everything, it's a show

subtitles.original: 目醒ませよ kill it
subtitles.english: Wake up and kill it

subtitles.original: Wake up, wake up, get up, get up
subtitles.english: Wake up, wake up, get up, get up

subtitles.original: ねぇ 聞いてんの?
subtitles.english: Hey, are you listening?

subtitles.original: ねぇ 聞いてんだろ?
subtitles.english: Hey, you're listening, right?

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から 選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: I've been choosing since the moment I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ 私は私だ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am myself

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど 何一つもないさ じゃないの?
subtitles.english: There's nothing impossible, isn't that right?

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から 選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: You've been choosing since the moment you were born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ あなたはあなただ
subtitles.english: Remember, you are yourself

subtitles.original: 不可能なことなど 何一つもないさ じゃないの?
subtitles.english: There's nothing impossible, isn't that right?

subtitles.original: なりたい自分に
subtitles.english: Into the person I want to be

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like it, hate it, common sense, I don't care - BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care 吹っ飛べ BANG!!!
subtitles.english: Like it, hate it, common sense, I don't care - BANG!!!

subtitles.original: 流れてく時の中ででも
subtitles.english: Even in the midst of flowing time,

subtitles.original: 倦怠さがほらグルグル回って
subtitles.english: I feel languid, look, spinning around and around

subtitles.original: 私から離れる心も見えないわ
subtitles.english: I can't even see my heart leaving me

subtitles.original: そう知らない
subtitles.english: That's right, I don't know

subtitles.original: 自分から動くこともなく
subtitles.english: Without even moving myself,

subtitles.original: 時の隙間に流され続けて
subtitles.english: continuing to be swept away in the gaps of time

subtitles.original: 知らないわ 周りのことなど
subtitles.english: I don't know about the things around me

subtitles.original: 私は私 それだけ
subtitles.english: I am me, that's all

subtitles.original: 夢見てる なにも見てない
subtitles.english: Dreaming, seeing nothing

subtitles.original: 語るも無駄な 自分の言葉
subtitles.english: My own words, useless to even speak

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて 疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Grieving is just exhausting

subtitles.original: なにも感じず 過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: It's fine to spend time feeling nothing

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉 与えられても
subtitles.english: Even if given words that confuse,

subtitles.original: 自分の心 ただ上の空
subtitles.english: my heart is just absent-minded

subtitles.original: もし私から 動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to move from myself,

subtitles.original: すべて変えるのなら 黒にする
subtitles.english: if everything were to change, I'd turn it black

subtitles.original: こんな自分に 未来はあるの?
subtitles.english: Is there a future for someone like me?

subtitles.original: こんな世界に 私はいるの?
subtitles.english: Am I in such a world?

subtitles.original: 今切ないの? 今悲しいの?
subtitles.english: Am I in pain now? Am I sad now?

subtitles.original: 自分のことも 分からないまま
subtitles.english: Without even knowing about myself

subtitles.original: 歩むことさえ 疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Even walking is just exhausting

subtitles.original: 人のことなど 知りもしないわ
subtitles.english: I don't even know about other people

subtitles.original: こんな私も 変われるのなら
subtitles.english: If even someone like me could change,

subtitles.original: もし変われるのなら 白になる
subtitles.english: if I could change, I'd turn white
